chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.136 of 2017 (S.I.T.E. & others Vs. Agha Abdul Munaim & another) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 04.12.2024 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the appellants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel on instructions does not press this appeal. Dismissed as not pressed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
